full_text:
Shan Jing 單經
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shan Jing (單經). Sent to aid Tao Qian against Cao Cao but defeated at Pingyuan. Shan Jing was affiliated with Gongsun Zan.
